use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action buttons with warning styling for delete or remove operations
Secondary outline buttons for less prominent actions in multi-step flows
Ghost buttons for subtle navigation and inline actions
Icon buttons for compact toolbars and action bars
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component from Ruixen.Ui with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and Tailwind CSS with subtle shadow effects. Features proper accessibility with focus-visible states and supports disabled states and asChild composition pattern.
